results.rendered_html: punarāvartin (pu˚ + ā˚) adj. wiederkehrend (in das irdische Leben)  YĀJÑ. 3,186 . zur Wiederkehr (in das irdische Leben) führend: ā brahmabhuvanāllokāḥ punarāvartino 'rjuna . māmupetya tu kaunteya punarjanma na vidyate ..  BHAG. 8,16 . mahāyogī tato gantā punarāvartinīṃ gatim  HARIV. 983 .
